cards.alt: Sean Winslow, photographed against warm paper, head and shoulders bust, light blue eye contact, subtle warm smile.
Sean as a traditional animation pencil-test sketch on warm cream paper, production label A-2 in the corner.
Sean drawn in a Saturday-morning comic-book panel style — bold ink outline, halftone shading, flat color, action-pose framing.
Sean rendered in the Loren Bouchard / Bob's Burgers character-design language — bean-shaped head, dot eyes, bold outline.
Sean as a shōnen anime cel — angular features, spiky hair, reflective highlights, bold outline, flat color.
Sean rendered in classic Nicktoons / Hey Arnold!-adjacent style — flat color, simple features, freckles, oval eyes.
Sean in modern Cartoon Network simplification — big oval eyes, dot pupils, exaggerated noodle proportions.
Sean as a Mike Allred-coded comic illustration — pop-art contour outlines, expressive cartoon eyes, watercolor background.
Sean in modern Cartoon Network style — almond eyes, light blue iris, clean line work, flat color (Steven Universe-adjacent).
Sean as a pop-art comic illustration — bulging cartoon blue eyes with rim highlights, sketchy ink linework, watercolor color.
